title: senecio angustilobatus
intro: Senecio angustilobatus, also known as Narrow-leaved Fireweed, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce swelling, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage. Senecio angustilobatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in poultices or salves to apply topically.
